SessionStart.description: Ensure QMD HTTP daemon is running. Non-blocking on failure.
Echo vault name for session context. Non-blocking.

FileChanged.description: Re-index QMD on markdown file changes (global qmd update)

PostCompact.description: Verify QMD daemon health after context compaction. Non-blocking.

Stop.command: qmd status --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'QMD: {d.get(\"document_count\",0)} docs indexed')" || true
Stop.description: Report QMD index freshness on session end
